data.body: memory-manager-commands.ts:42 generates 'kno update <id> --status <state>' commands injected into agent prompts for forward workflow transitions. Should generate 'kno next <id>' instead. Called from terminal-manager.ts:141 (buildProgressionCommands) and terminal-manager.ts:167 (buildSingleTargetFollowUpLines).
data.title: Replace kno update --status with kno next in buildWorkflowStateCommand
